description: An Ansible inventory containing groups and hosts targeted by playbook execution.

description.description: Description of the inventory and its purpose.
description.example: All production web server hosts across US-East region.

organization.description: ID of the organization that owns this inventory.

kind.description: Inventory kind — empty for standard, smart, or constructed.

variables.description: Inventory-level variables as a JSON or YAML string.

total_hosts.description: Total number of hosts in this inventory.

hosts_with_active_failures.description: Number of hosts with active failures.

total_groups.description: Total number of groups in this inventory.

has_inventory_sources.description: Whether this inventory has external inventory sources.

created.description: Timestamp when the inventory was created.

modified.description: Timestamp when the inventory was last modified.

name: Inventory
